name: Monkey.D.Luffy
effect: Apply each of the following effects based on the number of cards in your trash: • If there are 10 or more cards, this Character's base power becomes 9000 and it gains +10 cost. • If you have 20 or more cards, during your opponent's turn, your Leader's base power becomes 7000. • If you have 30 or more cards, this Character gains +1000 power.
